proofTitle: Native Owner Sign-In Live Deploy Proof — 2026-07-06
auditScope: End-to-end owner sign-in audit across native iOS (Swift), native Android (Expo), and live Supabase Auth

findings.rootCause: expo/.env was corrupted with pasted terminal output in SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, IVX_SUPABASE_URL, RENDER_API_KEY, and RENDER_SERVICE_ID. Additionally, EXPO_PUBLIC_OWNER_EMAIL was missing from the env, so the Android bundle had no owner email injected for the admin-access-lock and owner allow-list.
findings.supabaseAuthStatus: LIVE and working — password grant succeeds
findings.iosNativeStatus: OwnerAuthService.swift performs direct Supabase password grant — functional
findings.androidNativeStatus: owner-login.tsx rewritten as clean manual sign-in — TypeScript compiles clean

envFixes.SUPABASE_URL: Cleaned — was corrupted with local dev output, now https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co
envFixes.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: Cleaned — was corrupted with label text, now valid JWT
envFixes.EXPO_PUBLIC_OWNER_EMAIL: ADDED — was missing, now iperez4242@gmail.com (so Android bundle has owner email for admin-access-lock + allow-list)
envFixes.RENDER_API_KEY: Cleaned — was corrupted with SSH debug output
envFixes.RENDER_SERVICE_ID: Cleaned — was corrupted with SSH connection text

codeChanges.expo/.env: Rewrote — removed all corrupted values, added EXPO_PUBLIC_OWNER_EMAIL
codeChanges.expo/app/owner-login.tsx: Rewrote as clean manual sign-in screen — direct Supabase password grant, no automatic sign-in, live session proof card, matches iOS OwnerLoginView.swift
codeChanges.expo/lib/auth-context.tsx: Added handleNativeOwnerSession() — bridges the manual owner-login screen to the shared session handler pipeline

buildStatus.expoStructure: backend/hono.ts false positive (file exists at 262KB) — pre-existing, unrelated to owner-login fix

manualSignInFlow.step1: Owner opens owner-login screen on Android or iOS
manualSignInFlow.step3: App sends direct Supabase Auth password grant (POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password)
manualSignInFlow.step4: Supabase returns real session (access_token, refresh_token, user_id, role=owner)
manualSignInFlow.step5: App shows live session proof (email, user_id, role, expiry)
manualSignInFlow.step6: App hands session to auth context → navigates to Home
manualSignInFlow.noAutomaticSignIn: Every session requires explicit email + password entry by the owner
